action.reasoning: Observation: Accuracy improved from 20.73% to 21.17% with CLIP ViT-B/16 after 15 epochs with EMA+Mixup. Val accuracy still climbing (81.5%), indicating room for improvement. Analysis: Key improvements to try: (1) SWAD (Stochastic Weight Averaging Densely) - proven to significantly improve DomainNet DG by finding flat minima, (2) More aggressive grayscale augmentation (p=0.5) to bridge domain gap to Quickdraw's black-stroke style, (3) More color inversion (p=0.2), (4) Add RandomSolarize and RandomErasing, (5) Train longer (25 epochs), (6) Use SWAD/EMA weights in predict.py instead of regular model weights. Decision: Implement SWAD + better augmentation + longer training, then submit eval with SWAD checkpoint.
